papers.title: Fun-tuning: Characterizing the Vulnerability of Proprietary LLMs to Optimization-Based Prompt Injection Attacks via the Fine-Tuning Interface
papers.tldr_zh: Fun-tuning利用商业LLM微调API返回的损失信号，实现黑盒对抗性提示注入攻击，攻击成功率达65%–82%。
papers.venue: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy

papers.title: Graph of Attacks with Pruning: Optimizing Stealthy Jailbreak Prompt Generation for Enhanced LLM Content Moderation
papers.tldr_zh: GAP用互联图结构替代树状越狱框架，实现跨攻击路径的知识共享，攻击成功率超96%，查询成本降低62.7%。

papers.title: CyberLLMInstruct: A Pseudo-Malicious Dataset Revealing Safety-Performance Trade-offs in Cyber Security LLM Fine-tuning
papers.tldr_zh: CyberLLMInstruct 提出含54,928条伪恶意指令对的数据集，揭示了网络安全大模型微调中安全性与性能之间的严峻权衡。

papers.title: Jailbreaking Embodied LLMs via Action-level Manipulation
papers.tldr_zh: Blindfold通过语义无害的指令对具身LLM实施动作级攻击，绕过语言层安全过滤器，诱导AI执行危险物理动作。

papers.title: RAPO: Expanding Exploration for LLM Agents via Retrieval-Augmented Policy Optimization
papers.tldr_zh: RAPO通过检索增强策略优化，打破智能体强化学习中纯在线策略的探索瓶颈，实现步骤级离线信号融合以发现多样推理路径。

papers.title: Code2Math: Can Your Code Agent Effectively Evolve Math Problems Through Exploration?
papers.tldr_zh: Code2Math提出一个多智能体框架，利用代码执行智能体将现有数学题自动演化为更难的变体，解决高质量挑战性数学题稀缺的瓶颈问题。

papers.title: MoD-DPO: Towards Mitigating Cross-modal Hallucinations in Omni LLMs using Modality Decoupled Preference Optimization
papers.tldr_zh: MoD-DPO通过模态解耦的偏好优化与语言先验去偏惩罚，有效减少全模态大语言模型中的跨模态幻觉。
